claim: UNPFII documents life-expectancy gaps of 5-20 years between indigenous and non-indigenous populations, with fewer than 30 countries including indigenous identifiers in routine health data.

source.title: State of the World's Indigenous Peoples: Health

method: Reviewed UNPFII report chapters on health disparities and data collection.
limitations: Indigenous population data depends on self-identification and census methodology.
Health-disparity data is sparse and inconsistent across countries.
